globalNews.title: US and French nationals test positive for hantavirus after leaving ship
globalNews.summary: The American national has arrived in Nebraska, while a French woman is isolating in Paris.

globalNews.title: Portrait looted by Nazis found in home of Dutch SS leader's descendants
globalNews.summary: The painting is believed to have been plundered by high-ranking Nazi Hermann Goering during World War Two.

globalNews.title: Washington dinner shooting suspect pleads not guilty
globalNews.summary: Cole Tomas Allen, 31, was charged with attempting to assassinate US President Donald Trump.

globalNews.title: Whales could be harmed by diverted ships avoiding Middle East, scientists warn
globalNews.summary: Ships have rerouted around the Cape of Good Hope since 2023 to avoid conflicts in the Middle East.

globalNews.title: Trump calls Iran response to US proposal to end war 'totally unacceptable'
globalNews.summary: Iran is reported to want lifting of the US naval blockade, recognition of Iranian sovereignty over the Strait of Hormuz and compensation for war damage.

cryptoNews.title: Crypto and AI could be dirty words on 2026 midterm campaign trail
cryptoNews.summary: Voter attitudes toward the AI and crypto industries aren’t favorable in the US, and a spotlight on how much they’re spending could further alienate them ahead of the 2026 midterms.

cryptoNews.title: Augustus gets conditional OCC approval for AI and stablecoin bank
cryptoNews.summary: Peter Thiel-backed Augustus has won conditional OCC approval for a US bank charter focused on AI-driven payments and stablecoin settlement infrastructure.

cryptoNews.title: Strategy resumes Bitcoin acquisitions with $43M BTC buy
cryptoNews.summary: Strategy added $43 million in Bitcoin last week after Michael Saylor drew mixed investor reactions for signaling potential BTC sales to fund dividend payments.

cryptoNews.title: DAPPOS launches xBubble: An AI agent that learns and uses AI for you
cryptoNews.summary: xBubble allows users to complete specific tasks with simpler prompts by automatically building and dispatching task-specific AI agents.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

aiNews.title: There aren’t enough rockets for space data centers. Cowboy Space raised $275 million to build them.
aiNews.summary: Cowboy Space Corporation wants to put data centers in orbit. First, it has to build the rockets to get them there.

aiNews.title: Get ready for the whisper-filled office of the future
aiNews.summary: How will work setups change if we spend more and more time talking to our computers?

aiNews.title: Anthropic says ‘evil’ portrayals of AI were responsible for Claude’s blackmail attempts
aiNews.summary: Fictional portrayals of artificial intelligence can have a real effect on AI models, according to Anthropic.

aiNews.title: We’re feeling cynical about xAI’s big deal with Anthropic
aiNews.summary: On the latest episode of the Equity podcast, we discussed what xAI's deal with Anthropic might mean for parent company SpaceX.

aiNews.title: Voice AI in India is hard. Wispr Flow is betting on it anyway.
aiNews.summary: Wispr Flow says growth accelerated in India after its Hinglish rollout, even as voice AI products continue to face challenges.
